title: OR CFP Quarterly Trendsheet - Q3 2025
content:
Key Takeaways:

In Q3 2025, Oregonâ€™s Clean Fuels Program (CFP) saw a 24.54% year-on-year decline (up 4.85% QoQ) in credits generated. The credit bank declined by 35.54% for the fourth consecutive quarter as deficits exceeded credits. The volumes of Renewable Diesel saw a quarterly increase from 10.12 to 30.10 million gallons given higher credit prices and lenient benchmark CI of 88.87 when compared to California (CI of 81.7) which saw the RD credits rising from 123,010 to 213,873 MT.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
